MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, Turnover Order is off calendar, to be re-noticed in the Discovery Department. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-25-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
David Cook, Esq. for Plaintiff: Pacific Bell Directory, a corporation.
Plaintiff's witness: Don Grant, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Ellis Jones.
Exhibit 1 - Advertising------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Yellow Pages Adds------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3 - Financial Statement----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4 - Six Copies of Demand Letters-------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal $10,636.50 plus Interest.
Costs per memo of costs.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court and to prepare Judgment.

July 25, 2005
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2005 Set For Trial On Jul-11-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
